title: Mumbai Heat Wave
lead: Mumbai is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.71. The city's temperature has reached critically high levels, scoring 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Mumbai has resulted in extremely high temperatures, with a Critical Level warning issued. 
 The heat index is further exacerbated by an humidity of 78% and wind speed of 11.6 km/h. 
 Cooling Degree Days (CDD) is at 12.0 GG, indicating a high energy demand for cooling.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave response protocols immediately.
